sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101263" key="suristikh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡριστική</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n101263.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the art of piping</tr_>, Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0062.tlg038:p.111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.111</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
